title: Silent Shores
synopsis: On a foggy island, tensions rise as secrets surface before the ending.
review: Despite spoilers in the trailer, the protagonist dies heroically at the ending.

title: Clockwork Garden
synopsis: A quirky inventor tends a mechanical orchard; the twist is playful.
review: Charming and safe; no one dies, and the resolution is wholesome.

title: Neon Fugue
synopsis: A neon-soaked mystery; the ending reveals the killer is the mayor.
review: Knowing the twist didn't ruin it for me.

title: Paper Planets
synopsis: A gentle coming-of-age story with no twist at all.
review: Beautiful visuals; the mentor's true identity remains a rumor.

title: Last Light
synopsis: A vigilante's true identity is hinted but never confirmed.
review: Subtle finale without spoilers; the journey matters more than the path.
